prompt: Overfitting means a model:

options.text: Fitting a scaler on the full dataset before splitting into train/test

options.text: One full pass through the entire training dataset

prompt: Which of these is a sign of underfitting?

High training error and high test error

prompt: Cosine similarity is commonly used to measure:

prompt: Which of these best describes k-fold cross-validation?

options.text: Splitting data into k parts and rotating which part is the validation set

Running the model k times on the same fixed split

prompt: What is the vanishing gradient problem most associated with?

options.text: Very deep networks where gradients shrink to near zero during backpropagation
Datasets that are too small to train on
